question: Approximately, how does the number of visitors to Park C in Jun compare with the number of visitors to Park A in Jun?

options.A: Park C has about the same number of visitors as Park A
options.B: Park C has about half as many visitors as Park A
options.C: Park C has about 80% as many visitors as Park A
options.D: Park C has about twice as many visitors as Park A

explanation: The y-axis starts at 15 instead of 0, which visually exaggerates smaller components in a stacked area chart. In Jun, C is about 80% of A (data: 11.8 vs 15.3), but the truncated baseline can make it appear closer to 50%.
